tool_input.summary: No PDS dataset in the catalog is explicitly organized by the geologic unit names you mention ("silica outcrops", "Halley-class bedrock", "volcaniclastic deposits", "Home Plate"). To address the stratigraphic relationships, you’ll typically (1) use Spirit (MER-1) Pancam/Navcam/Hazcam imaging for layer/contacts at Home Plate, and (2) tie those mapped contacts to compositional constraints from APXS, Mini-TES, and Mössbauer; the Mars Target Encyclopedia (PDS4) helps you locate the relevant named targets/observations.

candidates.title: MER1-M-PANCAM-5-COLOR-MOSAICS-SCI-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Best starting point for stratigraphy at Home Plate: Pancam color mosaics provide the outcrop-scale context to place silica outcrops relative to bedrock (Halley-class) and volcaniclastic units.

candidates.title: MER1: PANCAM OPERATIONS EDR ARCHIVE
candidates.reasoning: Raw/operations Pancam images (highest flexibility for custom mosaics/DTM/photogeology) to map bedding/contacts at Home Plate and to trace silica-bearing surfaces across exposures.

candidates.title: MER1-M-PANCAM-2-EDR-SCI-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Science Pancam EDRs with PDS Geosciences indexing; useful if you want calibrated science imaging inputs for unit mapping around Home Plate.

candidates.title: MER1: NAVCAM OPERATIONS EDR ARCHIVE
candidates.reasoning: Navcam context imaging to connect local Home Plate stratigraphy to rover traverse geometry and broader geomorphic setting.

candidates.title: MER1: HAZCAM OPERATIONS EDR ARCHIVE
candidates.reasoning: Hazcam imaging provides close-range context and rover-position constraints when correlating specific APXS/Mini-TES spots to stratigraphic positions on/around Home Plate.

candidates.title: MER1-M-MI-3-RDR-SCI-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Microscopic Imager reduced data products for grain-scale textures—key for distinguishing volcaniclastic deposits (e.g., lapilli/ash textures) versus coherent bedrock and for characterizing silica-rich coatings/nodules.

candidates.title: MER1-M-APXS-2-XRAYSPEC-SCI-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: APXS spectra and derived chemistry constrain silica enrichment and help distinguish Halley-class bedrock compositions from volcaniclastic deposits at mapped stratigraphic levels.

candidates.title: MER1-M-MTES-3-RDR-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Mini-TES reduced data (RDR) for mineralogical/thermal spectral constraints; useful for identifying silica-rich materials and relating them to mapped units at Home Plate.

candidates.title: MER1-M-MTES-4-EMR-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Mini-TES higher-level derived products (EMR) that can help compare spectral endmembers among silica outcrops, Halley-class bedrock, and volcaniclastic units.

candidates.title: MER1-M-MB-4-SUMSPEC-SCI-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Mössbauer summary spectra help characterize Fe-bearing phases that may differ between altered silica-bearing materials and less-altered volcaniclastic/bedrock units, supporting stratigraphic interpretation.

candidates.title: MER1-M-ENG-6-RMC-OPS-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Rover Motion Counter / engineering-derived localization aids in tying specific compositional measurements to precise positions/elevations along Home Plate stratigraphic sections.

candidates.title: Mars Target Encyclopedia Database Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Best PDS4 resource for finding/organizing MER-1 target names and observation metadata (where you can look up entries corresponding to Home Plate, and potentially the named targets associated with silica and Halley-class bedrock).

candidates.title: Mars Target Encyclopedia MER-1 Collection
candidates.reasoning: MER-1-specific Mars Target Encyclopedia collection; useful to filter down to Spirit targets/observations for Home Plate-focused stratigraphic mapping and compositional spot correlation.

candidates.title: MER APXS Composite Spectra Bundle
candidates.mission: Mars Exploration Rovers: Spirit and Opportunity
candidates.reasoning: PDS4 APXS composite spectra/metadata library can speed comparison of APXS compositions among lithologic classes (e.g., silica-rich vs Halley-class vs volcaniclastic) once you’ve identified the relevant target IDs.

candidates.title: MER APXS Composite Spectra Library
candidates.mission: Mars Exploration Rovers: Spirit and Opportunity
candidates.reasoning: The data collection within the APXS composites bundle; use for programmatic access to composite spectra/derived concentrations to compare units across Home Plate.

parts.content:
You are a dataset-discovery assistant for the NASA PDS catalog (atm, geo, img, naif, ppi, rms, sbn nodes, ~12k datasets).

Tools are provided via MCP. You MUST call at least one search tool before returning results.

Interpret the user's science question, infer the relevant mission(s) and instrument(s), then search using mission/instrument keywords — not raw science terms alone. Return both PDS4 and PDS3 versions when available. Only return candidates you've seen in tool results — never invent IDs. Stay under ~10 tool calls. If nothing matches, return an empty list.
How do the silica outcrops relate stratigraphically to the Halley-class bedrock and the volcaniclastic deposits at Home Plate?

missions.name: B. Campbell Venus Earth-Based Radar Observations
Investigation of Complex Refractive Indices of Carbonates
Investigation of XAS Spectra of Synthesized Glasses
Lunar Crater Observation and Sensing Satellite
Lunar Simulants JSC-1A and LMS-1 Far-ultraviolet Reflectance
Mars Exploration Rovers: Spirit and Opportunity

datasets.title: MER APXS Composite Spectra Bundle
missions: Mars Exploration Rovers: Spirit and Opportunity

datasets.title: MER APXS Composite Spectra Library
missions: Mars Exploration Rovers: Spirit and Opportunity

dataset.title: Mars Target Encyclopedia Database Bundle
dataset.description: Information for how to cite the MTE bundle.

dataset.title: MER APXS Composite Spectra Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle contains a library of target characteristics, metadata, composite spectra, and concentrations created from individual spectra acquired by the Alpha Particle X-ray Spectrometers on Mars Exploration Rovers 1 and 2 (Opportunity and Spirit).
missions: Mars Exploration Rovers: Spirit and Opportunity

dataset.title: MER1: PANCAM OPERATIONS EDR ARCHIVE
dataset.description: This volume contains data acquired by the Panoramic Cameras onboard the MER1 rover. The volume also contains detailed documentation about the mission, spacecraft, instruments, data sets, as well as calibration information and index tables.

dataset.title: MER1: HAZCAM OPERATIONS EDR ARCHIVE
dataset.description: This volume contains data acquired by the Hazard Avoidance Camera onboard the MER1 rover. The volume also contains detailed documentation about the mission, spacecraft, instruments, data sets, as well as calibration information and index tables.

dataset.title: MER1: NAVCAM OPERATIONS EDR ARCHIVE
dataset.description: This volume contains data acquired by the Navigation Cameras onboard the MER1 rover. The volume also contains detailed documentation about the mission, spacecraft, instruments, data sets, as well as calibration information and index tables.

parts.args: {"query":"Home Plate volcaniclastic Spirit Pancam APXS Mini-TES","limit":20,"fields":"summary"}
